label: SBLJ_label
reason: Mario chains backwards long jumps sideways along the red-carpeted stairs, hugging the wall. After several SBLJs he abruptly appears under the floor (black void) near the lobby pillar before recovering—an out-of-bounds clip caused by the extreme reverse speed gained from a Side BLJ on stairs. No ledge grab or Bob-omb interaction is present, so this best matches SBLJ rather than other clipping methods or LBLJ.
